title: Forgot password and reset link expired
description: I need help. I forgot my password to access the portal. The reset email arrives, but when I click it says token expired.

title: Enabling 2FA for team account
description: How can we force 2-factor authentication across all member logins? I don't see the global MFA settings in the admin directory.

title: Suspicious login notification received
description: I just received an alert saying my account was logged in from Frankfurt, Germany, but I am in Canada. Is my password compromised?

title: Unlock account please
description: My account is locked out because I entered the wrong passcode too many times. Please unlock my credentials.

title: Password reset button grayed out
description: I am looking at the password change interface, but when I fill the inputs, the submit button is completely disabled. I can't update my credentials.

title: Double charge on monthly subscription
description: I checked my Visa bank statement today and I was billed twice ($29.99 each) for my monthly subscription. Please help me get a refund for the extra charge.

title: Download past invoices as PDF
description: I need my business invoices from last quarter for tax reporting. Where can I find and download billing receipts in PDF format?

title: Declined card payment on upgrade
description: I tried upgrading my tier to Enterprise, but my card keeps showing 'Transaction Declined'. I checked with my bank, and there is no blocker on their side.

title: Subscription cancellation query
description: I want to cancel my renewal starting from next month. Will I still have access to the dashboard until the current billing cycle expires?

title: Change invoice billing address
description: Can you please update our corporate tax details and billing address shown on future invoices? The new address is 500 Market St, SF.

title: API returning 500 error
description: I am sending a POST request to /v1/records and it keeps throwing a 500 Internal Server Error back. The request body is properly formatted. Here is the response: {"error": "Database connection timed out"}.

title: Console error on analytics page
description: The chart is not loading on my client portal. When I open developer tools, I see 'Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading data)' in bundle.js.

title: Service is down and offline
description: Our team cannot reach your platform. Everything is returning a gateway timeout or failing to load entirely. Is there a general outage active?

title: Broken contact form submission
description: Whenever we hit the submit button on the reach-out form, the application spins infinitely and nothing happens. No errors in console, just infinite loading spinner.

title: Data export failing to CSV
description: When I trigger download as CSV on the records grid, it saves a file containing 0 bytes. All row values are blank inside the file structure.

title: Request: Support dark mode interface
description: We work late shifts, and the bright white default layout causes eye fatigue. Would it be possible to add direct support for a dark mode styling toggle?

title: Sync records with Slack channel integrations
description: We want an option to automatically send message updates into our Slack channel whenever a high-confidence triage action is registered in the database.

title: Add multi-language support in notification templates
description: We are expanding our business globally. Can we get translation support for Spanish, French, and Japanese in automated email alerts?

title: Export records to Google Drive
description: It would save us a lot of time if we had a direct export button to sync database tables with Google Sheets API directly.

title: Bulk delete action inside reports library
description: Right now, we have to clean reports manually one-by-one. We request a checkbox selector to perform bulk delete operations on multiple rows.

title: Pricing overview inquiry
description: Do you offer any discounts for registered non-profit organizations or early-stage startups? We are planning to scale our teams next quarter.

title: What are your standard support desk hours?
description: I would like to know the typical operations window for your support team. Do you have technician coverage over weekend schedules?

title: Corporate office location
description: We are sending some formal hardware devices over for testing. Could you share the official physical mailing address of your regional headquarters?

title: Partnership opportunities inquiry
description: We are an agency looking to co-sell your product to our enterprise customers. Who should we contact from your partnerships or BD department?

title: General feedback regarding services
description: We have been using the product for six months. The performance is solid, and we appreciate the team's ongoing maintenance updates.
